name: Blank
original_name: เติมคำว่ารักลงในช่องว่าง
overview:
"Khun" Nueng, M.L. Sippakorn Anuntrakul, is a beautiful woman of royal lineage who grew up under the oppressive pressure of her grandmother. She was never allowed to be herself, never met anyone who could make her feel loved or worthy. Then she meets the cheerful and radiant Anueng, yet beneath her smiling face, a hidden sadness lingers in her eyes.

Anueng makes her heart beat like never before. Unfortunately, the sixteen-year age difference, along with family and societal norms, prevents their love from blossoming.
